clients.name: Synapse SPA
clients.description: Public PKCE client for the Synapse SPA (ADR-S024). Prod re-template of the dev realm file — see infra deploy/apps/synapse/bootstrap.sql.

clients.name: Synapse account-admin (service account)
clients.description: Confidential service-account client the server uses for account deletion (step 37) — client_credentials, scoped to realm-management:manage-users only. Keycloak generates its secret on import; reseal it into synapse-keycloak-admin (key client-secret) — see bootstrap.sql.
